description: Taxamo, now part of Vertex, provides tax calculation and compliance services for e-commerce and digital sales, including VAT/GST handling, reporting, invoicing, and related transaction workflows. Its developer-facing materials point to Vertex for e-Commerce documentation and the legacy Taxamo API.
summary: taxamo.com exposes a legacy Taxamo/Vertex for e-Commerce HTTP REST API at https://api.taxamo.com, authenticated with a Taxamo API token in the `Token` header; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
